text: Try to start it and read the exact message: `sudo systemctl start nginx`. Then `systemctl status nginx` ‚Äî note the loaded state in parentheses.

It says `masked`. A masked unit is symlinked to /dev/null so it can never be started (stronger than `disabled`). Confirm: `systemctl list-unit-files | grep nginx` and `ls -l /etc/systemd/system/nginx.service`.
Unmask then start: `sudo systemctl unmask nginx && sudo systemctl start nginx`. Verify with `systemctl is-active nginx`.
